message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Customer" as C
participant "Device" as D
participant "DeviceProvisioningService" as DPS
participant "ProductIoTHub" as PIH
participant "FWProvider" as FWP

note over D, PIH, FWP: Device was registered for this product before
note over C: First start

C ->> D: Switch On/Power Up
D ->> DPS: registerDevice(callback)
D <- DPS: callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
D ->> DPS: setProperties
D ->> DPS: iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)

opt [Firmware needs to be updated]
D ->> DPS: updateFWMandatory(URL)
D ->> PIH: URL.get(OLDFW)
D <- PIH: FW, Checksum
D ->> DPS: CheckChecksum
D ->> DPS: update
D ->> DPS: restart
D ->> DPS: Booting up
D ->> DPS: iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)
D ->> DPS: youMayStartSending()
D ->> PIH: sendData(Data)

note over D: Working
note over C: Claim/Remove

C ->> D: youMustRetire()
D ->> C: waits

opt [if Device was not reached]
D ->> PIH: sendData(Data)
D ->> PIH: Not registered
D ->> DPS: registerDevice(callback)
D <- DPS: callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ERROR, null, null)
D ->> C: NobodyLovesMeMode()

loop [once a day]
D ->> DPS: registerDevice(callback)
loop [several times]
D ->> PIH: sendData(Data)
D ->> PIH: NotAvailable/Network Error
D ->> DPS: registerDevice(callback)
D ->> DPS: callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
D ->> DPS: compare IoTHub and change if necessary
note over D: if connection is now successful, go on. If not and IoT Hub has not changed\nrepeat with low frequency. Also if DPS is not available.
end loop
end loop

@enduml
